AngleGap: Strong case study with specific metrics (75% less interview time, 53% faster time-to-hire, dropped from 12 interviews per hire to 2-3) but the win is framed entirely around Criteria's specific assessments (CCAT, EPP) — no transferable benchmark or industry rate to link to.

DistinctAngle: Aggregates the measurable outcomes from dozens of skills-assessment implementations (not just one company) into a benchmarkable report — giving the industry rate that this single case study proves but can't establish alone.

AngleGap: Detailed case study with hard metrics (turnover 48.2% to 36.9%, a 23% reduction) and a notable post-hire team-building angle — but the asset is self-contained, does not generalize to a benchmark, and the post-hire 'develop' tool is product-specific.
